code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut total = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_tok = false
  while i <= n
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        32
      end
    else
      b = 32
    end
    let is_space = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if is_space
      if in_tok
        let val = cur * sign
        if val > 0
          total = total + val
        else if val < 0
          total = total - val
        end
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_tok = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_tok = true
    else if b == 43
      in_tok = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_tok = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("r=#{total}")
end
